features.name: XaeroETA
features.description: Shows ETA to the looked-at Xaero temporary waypoint

children.name: TempOnly
children.description: Only show ETAs for temporary waypoints, not all of them.

children.name: LookAngle
children.description: How wide the horizontal look cone is (0=exact crosshair, 100=very loose)

children.name: MaxRange
children.description: Hide label beyond this distance (0 = off)

children.name: InKm
children.description: Interpret MaxRange as kilometres instead of metres

settings.name: Display
settings.description: What information to show in the label

children.name: HidePrefix
children.description: Hide the \"ETA: \" text before the time.

children.name: Name
children.description: Show the waypoint name in the label

children.name: FadeRange
children.description: Begin fading the label at this distance (blocks). 0 = off.

children.name: Distance
children.description: Show distance to waypoint in the label

children.name: AutoKm
children.description: Show km when distance is large, metres otherwise

children.name: UnknownETA
children.description: Show the label even when speed can't be measured yet

children.name: UnknownText
children.default: Text shown when ETA can't be calculated

children.name: Color
children.description: Color of the unknown ETA text

children.name: Rainbow
children.description: Apply rainbow gradient to the unknown text

children.name: ManualSpeed
children.description: Use a fixed speed instead of measuring it

children.name: NetherHwyDetect
children.description: Auto-use 40.79 bps when flying elytra in Nether at Y 115-125

children.name: Samples
children.description: Frames averaged for speed (more = smoother, less = reactive)

children.name: Threshold
children.description: Minimum speed (b/s) before ETA shows as unknown

children.name: AverageETA
children.description: Frames to average ETA over (0 = off)

children.name: RHFont
children.description: Use RusherHack font renderer instead of Minecraft font

children.name: Shadow
children.description: Draw a drop shadow behind the ETA text

children.name: Rainbow
children.description: Apply rainbow gradient to the ETA text

children.name: Anchored
children.description: Pin label to screen center instead of following the waypoint

children.name: PitchFollow
children.description: When Anchored, Y still follows camera pitch

children.name: Reset
children.description: Reset X and Y offset to 0
